[package]

edition = "2021"

[dependencies]

params.summary: Implemented contiguous vector storage with parking_lot RwLock, added SIMD-optimized L2 distance with AVX-512/AVX2 and cached dispatch, and optimized top-k selection with in-place max tracking and pointer-based loop.

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented contiguous vector storage with parking_lot RwLock, added SIMD-optimized L2 distance with AVX-512/AVX2 and cached dispatch, and optimized top-k selection with in-place max tracking and pointer-based loop.. Final QPS: 48.54, Recall: 0.9994
